dialogos.texto_en: (After walking around the spacious Shurijo Castle Park\n and finishing our tour%p-2;――%p;)
(We made our way to Kokusai dori.)
Wow, what a busy street!
I guess this is a normal sight\nfor Naha's downtown district,\nespecially on Kokusai dori.
There are so many shops!
With so many options, it's hard to decide where to go.
What should we do? Should we explore together?
We all want to go to different places, right?\nShould we split up?
Alright then,\nlet's make it free time until dinner.\nWe'll meet back here at the appointed time.
Okay, sounds good.
Freee tiiime!
That means we can do whatever we want, right?
Of course.
(Now, what should I do?\n I'd like to go with Itsuki if possible,\n but how do I invite her%p-2;――%p;)
Uesugi-ku... F-Futaro!!!
Wh-what is it?
U-um, if possible, could we...
Y-yeah, of course!\nI was just thinking of inviting you.
Good.\nThen, let's go.
Yeah.
(Well, even though I was just teasing her, I haven't\n really prepared myself to be called by my first name\n yet. I need to get used to it quickly...)
Well then, excuse us, we're going to head out.
See you guys later.
Hey, hey, Ichika.\nSomething sure is fishy.
Hmm, no doubt.
What are you talking about?
Well, it's just that...\nwe feel like Itsuki-chan\nis unusually enthusiastic about something.
Ah, so you guys were also curious about it too.
Like, how she was being all clingy\ntowards Uesugi-san, even at Umikaji Terrace?
Something does feel off, for sure.
I've been a bit curious too, to be honest.\nIt's not like Itsuki-san's usual self.
You too, huuuh, Raiha-chan?
But even though it's a little weird,\nit's not necessarily a bad thing.
Yeah, they're dating each other,\nso it's okay for her to be a bit forward.
Hmm, well, I guess so.
She's just putting too much pressure on herself,\nthat's all.\nAfter all, it's those two.
That's right.\nFor now, let's just warmly watch over them, okay?
Warmly...
What do you mean, what are you trying to say?
Oh no, nothing in particular.
